metadata.title: Build an SRX agent that performs memory engrave operations for a UK agency owner, processing chaotic language-mixed prompts into structured, governed memory artifacts.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX agent that performs memory engrave operations for a UK agency owner, processing chaotic language-mixed prompts into structured, governed memory artifacts.
mission.success_definition: Agent correctly parses and normalizes chaotic mixed-language input.; Generated memory_engrave artifact contains Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections.; Validation gates are present and documented.; Artifact passes SR8 compilation without errors.

in_scope.item: The agent shall accept language_mixed_prompt inputs, extract and normalize intent, apply validation gates, and produce a memory_engrave artifact compliant with SR8 compilation requirements.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent correctly parses and normalizes chaotic mixed-language input.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Generated memory_engrave artifact contains Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are present and documented.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Artifact passes SR8 compilation without errors.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.mission_contract: Build an SRX agent that performs memory engrave operations for a UK agency owner, processing chaotic language-mixed prompts into structured, governed memory artifacts.

operating_rules.item: Must operate under UK data protection regulations (GDPR/DPA 2018).
Input may be missing context, contain urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria.
Output must include explicit validation gates and be structured for SR8 compilation.
Runtime lens must enforce governance and auditability.

tool_policy.item: Use only declared tools and record tool limitations.

output_artifact_contract.item: sections: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent
compiled_intent_structure: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: array of strings; Success Criteria: array of strings; Output Contract: object

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
